final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original marketing poster for a pearl milk tea (珍珠奶茶) brand, styled as a Xiaohongshu (小红书) product cover in a pink girly summer aesthetic.

Style/medium: pastel flat-lay product photography with soft editorial styling, inspired by Korean beauty brand campaigns and Xiaohongshu top-tier 种草 cover aesthetics
Composition: portrait-oriented close-up, slightly overhead angle, subject centered with generous negative space, shallow depth of field on the drink
Subject: a tall clear cup of pearl milk tea (珍珠奶茶) filled with large black tapioca pearls, pastel pink milk tea liquid, wide straw, condensation droplets on the cup surface
Scene/backdrop: soft pink gradient background with scattered dried flower petals, pastel ribbon accents, and subtle summer props (e.g., small seashells or translucent ice cubes)
Lighting/mood: bright diffused natural window light from the upper left, airy and fresh, evoking cool summer refreshment and a dreamy girly mood
Color palette: dominant blush pink and creamy white as base, black tapioca pearls as contrast anchor, soft lavender and peach as accent tones
Materials/textures: dewy condensation on plastic cup, glossy liquid surface, soft matte petals, translucent ice
Avoid: dark moody tones, harsh shadows, oversaturated neon colors, cluttered backgrounds, generic stock-photo flatness, watermark
